form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 2nd over 320m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (18.40) behind Florida Line in a Grade 5 on April 12. Good beginner and should go close off the inside draw.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 320m at this track behind Anjo Ruby beaten 2.5 lengths (18.55). Won at his only start from this draw. Top chance to make it two from two.
